ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "neighbourhood_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood group where the listing is located */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific neighborhood where the listing is located */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the listing */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing location */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of room (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the listing */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings the host has */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available for booking in the next 365 days */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Year and month of the data (e.g., 201612) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the host has been verified */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the host */,
  "verification_code" TEXT /* Verification code for the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_categories_listings" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being replied to */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listing_images_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)
column_names: ID of the host who owns the listing
Reference to the neighborhood group where the listing is located
Reference to the specific neighborhood where the listing is located

Number of days the listing is available for booking in the next 365 days
